arts.ttl: Why Man City have been losing the plot in Europe - and why they MUST fix it tonight, writes JACK GAUGHAN
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: City usually stay overnight after European away fixtures but decided against it for Paris. Pep Guardiola's players will have been glad to have left the scene of the crime quickly.
